name: goldbot-lab
description: Gold Mine Trading Bot — lab analysis plugins for Claude Code Desktop

plugins.name: lab-query-signal-performance
plugins.description: Query TP hit rates and win rate for GS or Ceddi signals with multi-timeframe breakdown

plugins.name: lab-query-channel-credibility
plugins.description: Compare L2 claimed vs L3 candle-truth agreement per signal provider

plugins.name: lab-query-execution-gaps
plugins.description: Capture efficiency: lab perfect-sim vs bot execution, per provider and window

plugins.name: lab-query-drawdown-profile
plugins.description: Drawdown stats, consecutive-SL streaks, and Markov transition matrix from lab backtest results

plugins.name: lab-fetch-scenarios
plugins.description: List all backtest scenario results, sortable by win rate, profit factor, or drawdown

plugins.name: lab-create-scenario
plugins.description: Create a new backtest scenario YAML, run it, and return results

plugins.name: lab-clone-scenario
plugins.description: Clone an existing scenario YAML with key overrides, run it, and return results

plugins.name: lab-prune-scenarios
plugins.description: Soft-delete auto-generated backtest runs older than N days — dry-run by default, YAML files kept on disk

plugins.name: pnl-broker
plugins.description: Broker-truth P&L for one account from deals.bin, split by bot vs scalps

plugins.name: pnl-dispatch
plugins.description: What dispatch_records THINKS one account made — diff vs pnl-broker catches recording bugs

plugins.name: whatif-channel
plugins.description: Counterfactual: what would channel X make at $Y starting balance and Z% risk across full lab history
